mapper.select: select count(*) from notifications where is_read = false
select * from notifications order by created_at desc, id desc limit #{limit} offset #{offset}
select * from notifications where type = 'article_published' and target_id = #{articleId} order by id desc limit 1
mapper.insert: insert into notifications (type, title, content, link, data, target_id, sender) values (#{type}, #{title}, #{content}, #{link}, #{data}, #{targetId}, #{sender})
mapper.update: update notifications set is_read = true, read_at = current_timestamp where is_read = false
